name: Arteris, Inc.
business: Arteris is a leading provider of semiconductor system IP, including interconnect and other intellectual property (System IP) technology. Its System IP manages on-chip communications and IP block deployments for System-on-Chip (SoC) semiconductors. Products incorporating its IP are used in aerospace and defense, automotive, communications, consumer electronics, enterprise computing, and industrial markets.

exposures.sentence: The rapid expansion of AI applications across various industries, combined with the increasing complexity of electronic system design, is accelerating the use of network-on-chip technologies.
Large-scale AI cloud data centers are augmenting and replacing corporate data centers.
we are a leader in the market of interconnect for advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) SoCs
The aerospace and defense sector, including government-sponsored programs, is undergoing a technology transition toward more highly integrated, software-defined systems.
Our System IP and its resilience features have also seen increasing adoption for space exploration related applications.
With the acquisition of Cycuity, we are now working to help semiconductor and system companies developing chips and chiplets to mitigate hardware chip-level security risks.
The wireless communications market is in the midst of disruption as 5G becomes more prevalent.
Consumer electronics are trending towards being smaller, lighter, and more portable, while consumers expect simultaneously increased functionality and performance.

We provide solutions for the global chiplet and SoC market and believe that market growth will be driven by an increasing number of SoC designs and growing complexity... in the aerospace and defense, automotive, communications, consumer electronics, enterprise computing, and industrial markets.

catalysts.sentence: On January 14, 2026, we completed the acquisition of Cycuity.

catalysts.event: Filed S-3 Registration Statement for up to $200 million
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we filed a Registration Statement on Form S-3 covering the offering of up to $200.0 million of common stock, preferred stock, debt securities, warrants and units.

catalysts.event: Entered into ATM Offering Program for up to $75 million
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we also entered into an Open Market Sales Agreement (the Sales Agreement) with Jefferies LLC as sales agent to sell shares of our common stock, from time to time, with aggregate gross sales proceeds of up to $75.0 million.

catalysts.event: Announced release of FlexGen non-coherent NoC IP product
catalysts.sentence: In 2025 we announced the release of an innovative new non-coherent NoC IP product FlexGen
